Title: Hand-Stitched Bookmark Sleeve T-Shirt
Description:
Celebrate the beauty of traditional craft with this unique, conversation-starting tee. The design features a stylized, hand-stitched bookmark sleeve, embodying the meticulous artistry of Japanese papercraft.

This tee is perfect for literature lovers, students, or anyone who appreciates cultural details and thoughtful, minimalist design. The rich, burnt orange color contrasts beautifully with the earthy green of the bookmark, making the graphic pop.

Product Details:

  • Style: Relaxed fit, unisex t-shirt.
  • Design: Detailed graphic print of a traditional Japanese bookmark (しおり) and accompanying message.
  • Material: Soft, comfortable, and breathable fabric suitable for all-day wear.
  • Occasion: An excellent choice for book festivals, creative gatherings, or as a unique gift for a friend who loves reading.

Wear a piece of art and carry a celebration of history and craft wherever you go. Makes a wonderful, thoughtful gift.
